take off.translate: 1) Снимать (одежду) 2) Взлетать (о самолёте) 3) Становиться успешным (о карьере, продукте)(Идиоматическое выражение)
synonyms: Становиться успешным (о карьере, продукте) - succeed, boom

examples.eng: The trend took off on social media.
examples.ru: Тренд стал популярным в социальных сетях.

examples.eng: The helicopter took off from the roof.
Flight 237 will take off in 30 minutes.
His business took off after the investment.
examples.ru: Его бизнес пошёл в гору после инвестиций.

examples.eng: She took off her glasses to read.
Take off your coat — it's warm inside.
Please take off your shoes.
Sales took off during the holiday season.
examples.ru: Продажи взлетели во время праздничного сезона.

examples.eng: The plane takes off at 6 PM.
Her career really took off last year.
examples.ru: Её карьера действительно взлетела в прошлом году.

examples.eng: He took off his jacket and sat down.
I took off my wet clothes immediately.
We took off on time despite the weather.
examples.ru: Мы взлетели вовремя, несмотря на погоду.

examples.eng: The bird took off from the branch.
The product took off immediately.
Take off your shirt - it's very hot in here
Take yourself off!
The wind is taking off.
He took the responsibility off me.
He took off weight every day.
examples.ru: Он сбавлял в весе каждый день.

examples.eng: He took me off to the garden.
The waves took me off my feet.
A strong cup of tea takes off the weariness.
Take off your coat and stay awhile.
He took off from here.
The retailer will take off his selling price.
The river takes off from this lake.
I can only stay for a few minutes, and then I'll need to take off again.
examples.ru: Я могу задержаться только на несколько минут, а потом мне снова нужно будет убегать.

examples.eng: The plague took off her parents.
The ball took off from the post.
